## tscli config setup

Interactive config setup

### Synopsis

Launch an interactive Bubble Tea setup flow for optional AGE encryption and tailnet profile management.

```
tscli config setup [flags]
```

### Examples

```
tscli config setup
tscli config setup  # rerun later to add or delete profiles
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for setup
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [human json pretty yaml]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```
